title: The National Security Act, 1980
full_text: The National Security Act, 1980 राष्‍ट्रीय सुरक्षा अधिनियम, 1980 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198065 Act Number: 65 Enactment Date: 1980-12-27 Act Year: 1980 Short Title: The National Security Act, 1980 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्रीय सुरक्षा अधिनियम, 1980 Long Title: An Act to provide for preventive detention in certain cases and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 27-12-1980 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The National Security Act, 1980 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to make orders detaining certain persons. Section 4. Execution of detention orders. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Power to regulate place and conditions of detention. Section 5A. Grounds of detention severable. Section 6. Detention orders not to be invalid or inoperative on certain grounds. Section 7. Powers in relation to absconding persons. Section 8. Grounds of order of detention to be disclosed to persons affected by the order. Section 9. Constitution of Advisory Boards. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Reference to Advisory Boards. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Procedure of Advisory Boards. Section 12. Action upon the report of the Advisory Board. Section 13. Maximum period of detention. Section 14. Revocation of detention orders. Show Related Subordinates Section 14A. Circumstances in which persons may be detained for periods longer than three months without obtaining the opinion of Advisory Boards. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Temporary release of persons detained. Section 16. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 17. Act not to have effect with respect to detentions under State laws. Section 18. Repeal and saving.
